text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Right before the Asahi Hai F.S. starts, Narita
Brian runs out of the tape she always wears on her
nose.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unsure which kind is the best, I buy all of the tape
at the nearest store. Narita Brian is shocked at my
wasteful spending.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But the huge amount is a symbol of my faith that
she'll keep winning, no matter who she's up
against, meaning she'll eventually need all of that
tape.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian fixes the tape to her nose and
focuses her attention on the race.
